settings.title: Multi-language
settings.intro: Configure additional languages. Each enabled language gets its own URL prefix and per-post translations.

primaryLanguage.title: Primary language
primaryLanguage.help: Pages in this language live at the root URL (no language prefix). All other languages render under /<lang>/.

enabledLanguages.title: Additional languages
enabledLanguages.help: Click a language to toggle it. Enabled languages appear in the editor's Translations tab + on the public site under /<lang>/.

homePages.title: Home page per language
homePages.help: Optional: pick a static page (in the corresponding language) to render at /<lang>/. Leave empty for a basic latest-posts list.

switcher.title: Language switcher
switcher.help: Show a language switcher on the public site. Themes must include a [data-cms-langswitch] container in their Header / Footer for the switcher to appear (built-in themes already do).
switcher.header: Show switcher in the site header
switcher.footer: Show switcher in the site footer

tab.label: Translations
tab.noLanguages: No additional languages are configured for this site.
tab.editPrimaryInMain: Edit the primary language in the main editor (title, slug, content above).

fields.title: Title
fields.contentHelp: Plain Markdown. Theme blocks (Hero, embeds, etc.) embedded in the primary language do NOT replicate automatically — paste your translated body here.

termSection.title: Translations
termSection.name: Name
termSection.noLanguages: Enable secondary languages in the Multi-language plugin settings to translate this term.
